title: How Anthropic Doesn't Build the WRONG Things with Claude
summary: Austin Marchese presents four rules derived from public statements by Anthropic founders Dario and Daniela Amodei for deciding what to build with Claude. The framework is framed as guidance for entrepreneurs and individuals to avoid building the wrong products, applicable to side projects, startups, and day-job tasks.
